title: Turning solid waste into resources in Gaziantep
description: A new EUR 9.2 million facility funded by the EU and constructed by UNDP provides green solutions to help the municipality meet daunting challenges in waste management

title: Business development bootcamp to benefit women’s cooperatives and women entrepreneurs
description: UNDP and Japan help women-led businesses weather the pandemic and build ties between refugees and host communities

title: How has UNDP supported Syrians and host communities in Turkey during the last 4 years?
description: UNDP’s initiatives aiming to support Turkey to build resilience in response to the Syria Crisis since 2018 presented

title: undpturkiye.exposure.co
Merveşehir Public Education Centre built in the framework of Turkey Resilience Project in Response to Syria Crisis Opens
description: The opening ceremony of the Merveşehir Public Education Centre built under the “Turkey Resilience Project in Response to the Syria Crisis (TRP) - Adult Language Trainings Component" implemented jointly by the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) and General Directorate of Lifelong Learning of the Turkish Ministry of National Education (MoNE - GDLL) with funding from the European Union (EU) has been held. Merveşehir Public Education Centre, which was established under the project, will be the new hub of Lifelong Learning in Gaziantep.

title: undpturkiye.exposure.co
Syrian and Turkish Women Entrepreneurs Come Together on “Power of Hope” Demo Day
description: Syrian and Turkish women entrepreneurs came together and had an opportunity to promote their enterprises to participants in entrepreneurship ecosystems.

title: Supporting Syrian Businesses: Unleashing the Potential
description: The event “Supporting Syrian Businesses: Unleashing the Potential” informed the participants of the activities undertaken jointly by UNDP Turkey and İNGEV to support the inclusion of Syrian-owned enterprises and entrepreneurs in employment, outcomes of such activities, and recommendations on future intervention areas.

title: undpturkiye.exposure.co
UNDP Turkey Supports Hatay Metropolitan Municipality in Wastewater Treatment and Waste Management Through Investments to Alleviate Environmental Impact of Syrian Crisis
description: Kırıkhan, Yayladağ and Samandağ Solid Waste Transfer Stations and Hassa Wastewater Treatment Plant were commissioned for operations under the Turkey Resilience Project in Response to the Syria Crisis (TRP) implemented by the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) in cooperation with ILBANK with funding from the European Union (EU).

title: The Learn & Transform Program Starts in Mersin and Gaziantep Model Factories
description: With Learn & Transform Program in the Model Factories implemented in cooperation with the Mersin Chamber of Commerce and Industry in Mersin and the Gaziantep Chamber of Industry in Gaziantep, theoretical and practical trainings are given to companies in the manufacturing industry to increase productivity.

title: İzmir Welcomes UNDP Turkey’s New Resident Representative
description: After her first field visit to Gaziantep, the Resident Representative of the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) in Turkey, Louisa Vinton paid a two-day visit to İzmir to carry out an on-site examination of the work of UNDP Turkey supporting local socio-economic development.

title: Freelance Working Platform “Dukkan” Launched
description: Dukkan was launched with the motto of “A New Social Approach to Freelancing.”

title: UNPD Turkey Aims to Contribute to Job Creation in the Textile Industry Through Vocational Training in Izmir
description: The "Menswear Sewing Course" that aims to contribute to the development of professional skills and the employment of Syrians living under temporary protection and host community members in İzmir took place between the dates of 12 October 2020 and 8 January 2021.

title: Training on Life Skills at Work, Career Development and Gender Responsive Companies and Institutions Starts!
description: The Training on Life Skills at Work, Career Development and Gender Responsive Companies and Institutions developed under the Turkey Resilience Project in Response to the Syria Crisis (TRP) aims to improve work life skills of trainees and minimize the challenges that workers may face at work due to lack of information on work culture and working regulations.

title: Applications are now open for the 6th International Migration Photography Contest!
description: Applications are now being accepted for the 6th International Migration Photography Contest themed “UNDERSTANDING Refugees - TELLING Refugees” that will be held by Gölcük Municipality and Gölcük Photography and Cinema Art Association in cooperation with UNDP Turkey.

title: UNDP Turkey Supports Gender Mainstreaming in Local Administrations
description: Gender-responsive transformation and gender mainstreaming activities include increasing the awareness of companies and institutions on gender equality and supporting their active participation in the promotion of this equality.

title: UNDP helps empower women’s cooperatives and women entrepreneurs through consultancy and mentoring support
description: Women’s cooperatives and women entrepreneurs acquire knowledge and skills they need to grow and strengthen their enterprises

title: reliefweb.int
undpturkiye.exposure.co
UNDP boosts business opportunities for women entrepreneurs
description: With support from Japan, UNDP organizes “matchmaking” event for leading Turkish companies and women-led businesses

title: “Cool Up” programme promotes sustainable cooling in Egypt, Jordan, Lebanon and Türkiye
UNDP boosts resilience of Syrian refugees and  host communities in Türkiye
UNDP and Turkish Government fight invasive species in rivers and oceans
Experts join forces to fight marine invasive alien species in Turkish seas
UNDP helps women entrepreneurs build better businesses in Türkiye
Turkish diving star joins UNDP to fight water pollution
UNDP’s training in renewable energy will further expand in 2023
UNDP invites applications for renewable energy training
UNDP launches grants program to help women entrepreneurs in Türkiye recover from earthquakes
UNDP to award US$4.5 million in grants to help earthquake-hit small businesses
Top UNDP official reaffirms support for  post-earthquake recovery in Türkiye
EU funds €22.2 million initiative to mobilize local climate action in Türkiye
UNDP invests in women entrepreneurs to spur economic recovery after Türkiye earthquakes
undpturkiye.exposure.co
undpturkiye.exposure.co
reliefweb.int
UNDP launches new recovery efforts as Türkiye marks first anniversary of devastating earthquakes
description: One year after the devastating earthquakes in Türkiye, UNDP launched initiatives across four provinces to support socio-economic recovery, including establishing a women’s entrepreneurship center, creating regional centers for prostheses, and opening "accessible community centers" for vulnerable groups.

title: reliefweb.int
UNDP marks International Women’s Day by celebrating women’s resilience in earthquake recovery
description: Women entrepreneurs in Türkiye's earthquake-affected Hatay region shared inspiring recovery stories highlighting the positive economic and psychological impacts of UNDP's Sweden-funded earthquake recovery grants, which supported 4,616 small businesses across 11 provinces, with a special focus on women-led enterprises.

title: reliefweb.int
undpturkiye.exposure.co
Head of UNDP reaffirms support for post-earthquake recovery in Türkiye
description: UNDP Administrator Achim Steiner praised Türkiye's development progress, noting its rise to 45th place in the Human Development Index (HDI) among 193 countries, and reaffirmed UNDP's commitment to supporting Türkiye's recovery efforts following the 2023 earthquakes.

title: UNDP takes action for the first local climate action plans in the earthquake region
description: The "EU Partnership for Local Climate Action in Türkiye" project has begun preparing Local Climate Change Action Plans for pilot municipalities, focusing on equipping local authorities with tools to address climate change risks, including wildfires, floods, and droughts, with support from UNDP and the Ministry of Environment.

title: Rescuing cultural heritage from earthquake devastation: UNDP and Europa Nostra support Türkiye’s recovery
description: The UNDP's "Save the Legacy" campaign launched in Brussels to advocate for the restoration of cultural heritage sites in Türkiye damaged by the February 2023 earthquakes, with a goal of preserving local identity and livelihoods.

title: reliefweb.int
UNDP builds two model facilities to process and recycle earthquake debris in Türkiye
description: UNDP and MoEUCC have completed two model facilities in Hatay and Kahramanmaraş for safe earthquake debris processing and recycling, funded by Japan's JPY700 million project, aimed at managing debris sustainably and reducing environmental and health risks.

title: UNDP launches new initiative to strengthen urban waste management and social cohesion with zero waste approach
description: UNDP’s new project in eight municipalities across Türkiye, funded by the U.S. Bureau of Population, Refugees, and Migration, aims to enhance waste management systems through zero-waste practices, capacity building, and improved environmental conditions, particularly in areas hosting large numbers of refugees.

title: New employment project for Roma youth launched in Izmir
description: UNDP’s new initiative in Izmir aims to boost Roma youth employment through vocational training and job placement, creating a sustainable local model for social and economic inclusion.

title: undpturkiye.exposure.co
undpturkiye.exposure.co
undpturkiye.exposure.co
Akbank Sustainable Cooling Financing Programme launched in Istanbul
description: Akbank sustainable cooling financing programme launched in Istanbul

title: UNDP supports Türkiye in strengthening its long-term climate strategies
description: Training sessions bringing together 590 participants from various sectors have helped raise awareness of Türkiye’s fight against climate change and strengthen collaboration among stakeholders

title: UNDP concludes its project targeting invasive alien species in Türkiye's seas
description: Since 2018, the MarIAS project has strengthened Türkiye’s fight against marine invasive alien species through legislation, capacity building, awareness campaigns, and the creation of national strategies and tools—laying a lasting foundation for resilient marine ecosystems and biodiversity protection.

title: Eco Future Grant Programme completes informative sessions across Türkiye
description: The Eco Future Grant Programme held informative sessions in six cities across Türkiye, reaching over 390 CSO representatives with detailed guidance on application procedures, funding, and project goals. Funded by the EU, the programme aims to strengthen civil society’s role in climate action and biodiversity conservation through technical and financial support.

title: Local capacity strengthens in combating climate change
description: Trainings held under the Cool Up Programme strengthened Türkiye’s local capacity to combat climate change by enhancing the technical and regulatory expertise of provincial environmental inspection personnel.

title: UNDP and EU strengthen civil society’s capacity on climate and biodiversity action in Türkiye
description: Launched jointly by UNDP and the EU Delegation to Türkiye, the Eco Future Grant Programme will empower CSOs with funding and expertise to develop innovative, nature-based solutions for climate action and biodiversity protection. With a total budget of US$4.39 million until 2028, the initiative supports civil society’s leading role in achieving net-zero and nature-positive outcomes.
